content: Is something fundamentally wrong with this team? I'm at end of chapter 7 and it is really struggling. If I replace Tawil with Castor it gets kinda easier (more damage), even Aigis works better (cause of health regen from furnace and baby eating energy). But this lineup just struggles against high hp units - they take too much of my hp before I can do anything and I cannot exalt too often. I kinda like Tawil, so looking for ways to make her work better lol

Wheels are kinda a mess. But can't help rn, need to do irl stuff 🙁
Costco wheels help a lot, I see only one on Tulu. You can give Tawil's wheel to Murphy, Tawil could use Blade of the Titan + To my dearest. Anyway, someone gonna help soon probably.

yeah, sounds about right. Tawil plays the most cards so I put the ones that generate keyflare on her lol, but probably the dps ones would be more effective on her. Also I thought the one on Murphy is part of costco. And the 3rd one just makes the refresh cheaper so I never fully understood why it is so good too

Well just from the lineup u don't have a dps unit. Everyone is running a support build
Also at ur level its important to invest in skills to be stronger.
The simplest solution would be to copy the build Horizon just posted and add the merciful nurturing u have to it. Tulu/Goliath are similar units so u don't need to change the team at all
Gluttony/Whisper are very good R wheels as well. Especially Gluttony, helps with surviving a lot.

I guess then a follow up question - am I missing something for aliemus generation? Cause wheel of titan works only after an exalt and somehow I have a hard time to exalt often. Or is the idea to just do a bust turn like once in 3-4 turns?
Burst once in 3-4 turns + Whisper could help with Aliemus. Gluttony would help with surviving until you have the cards for burst.
also I guess my stats might be low lol. level 44 acc so cannot even upgrade covenants, not sure how much will those help though
Once in 3/4 turns. Stronger versions of the comp can do it faster but u lack the investment/units
Covs also make a world of difference

By the way, I wish someone told me that Ramona would be needed as a requirement unit <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>

There are guides on Tawil by Flares. Even though I use her as main damage dealer as well, I'm not that experienced. As far as I get it, the best way is to spam wings and using exalt when you have Four Wings, that way you get more temporary strengths and several Six Wings copies. What’s the best Aequor team I can build?
Why Murphy over Pharos ? Because the shield?
Faros base kit is Poison. No one your team applies Poison. Her Exalt can flex to any team thou as its utility is amazing.

Murphy provides Weakness and Vulnerable in her 3 Cost Card. Her 0 cost gives you a massive Shield at a cost of “Sacrifice”(A DoT). Her Exalt halves all damage taken and takes a “Sacrifice”. Her 3 cost can half the Sacrifice DoT.
That team is still wonky because you want to focus on ONE archetype or mechanic, but it’s your “best” Aequor team.

I’ve heard Pollux needs to play with Caster should I pull for him too?

Pollux needs more than just Castor. With Castor he is easier to play, but Castor will out damage him always. The only time Castor wont out damage Pollux is if you invest only in Pollux and not Castor.
Pollux also wants E3(Base +3 Copies) or OE(Base +7 Copies) to be able to scale to late/endgame.

Some ppl that play pollux actually say they are not good together. But castor is still strong so you might want to pull for him anyway. However pollux needs dupes to work well (ideally 7 dupes to unlock his over exalt), same as tawil, she needs 1 dupe min
